vocab.meaning: khung mạ vàng chạm trổ công phu
vocab.example: I once splurged on a large mirror with an ornate gilded frame to serve as a statement piece in my hallway.

vocab.meaning: tạo cảm giác không gian rộng hơn
vocab.example: I bought several floor-to-ceiling mirrors specifically to create an illusion of space in my cramped studio apartment.

vocab.meaning: món đồ săn được ở chợ đồ cũ/chợ trời
vocab.example: One of my favorite mirrors was a lucky flea market find that had a charming, rustic aesthetic.

vocab.meaning: cạnh vát (thường thấy ở gương cao cấp)
vocab.example: I prefer mirrors with beveled edges because they catch the light beautifully and look much more sophisticated.

vocab.meaning: tôn lên/phù hợp với nội thất trong nhà
vocab.example: It took me weeks to find a minimalist mirror that would perfectly complement the interior decor of my bedroom.
The most practical purchase I've made recently was a full-length dressing mirror for my walk-in closet.

vocab.meaning: kính chống vỡ/kính cường lực an toàn
vocab.example: Safety was my top priority, so I made sure the bathroom mirror was made of high-quality shatterproof glass.
I acquired a stunning Victorian-style mirror from a local antique merchant who specializes in 19th-century home goods.

vocab.meaning: tăng cường ánh sáng tự nhiên
vocab.example: We positioned the new mirror opposite the window to amplify natural light and brighten up the dark corner of the room.
Since my vanity table was an unusual size, I had to order a mirror with bespoke dimensions to fit the space.
